title: Rubio declares Operation Epic Fury 'over' — objectives achieved; Operation Sledgehammer still under consideration for next phase
snippet: Secretary of State Marco Rubio declared Operation Epic Fury 'over,' stating objectives achieved. Pentagon still considering Operation Sledgehammer as name for next phase if ceasefire collapses. A White House official says any new combat phase would be treated as restarting the 60-day WPR clock. This is the latest step in the administration's strategy to bypass Congressional authorization for extended military action.
tag_reason: 루비오의 '에픽 퓨리 종료' 공식 선언은 신규. 5/14 src-1057의 검토 단계에서 공식 선언으로 진전.
